final_text:
{
  "test_strategy": "The testing strategy will include functional, API, security, integration, and regression testing to ensure the Cricket Worldcup Management System meets all requirements and performs optimally under various conditions.",
  "functional_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify user registration and authentication functionality.",
    "Test match scheduling and management features.",
    "Check player statistics tracking accuracy.",
    "Ensure live score updates are displayed correctly.",
    "Verify notifications and alerts are sent as expected."
  ],
  "api_test_scenarios": [
    "Test User API endpoints for CRUD operations.",
    "Validate Match API endpoints for scheduling and management.",
    "Check Statistics API for accurate player and team data.",
    "Ensure Notification API sends notifications correctly."
  ],
  "security_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify HTTPS enforcement across all services.",
    "Test JWT authentication for secure access.",
    "Check data encryption implementation for sensitive data."
  ],
  "integration_test_scenarios": [
    "Test integration with email service for sending notifications.",
    "Verify SMS service integration for alerts.",
    "Check third-party statistics API integration for data accuracy."
  ],
  "regression_test_scenarios": [
    "Retest user registration after changes to ensure no new issues.",
    "Retest match scheduling after updates to confirm functionality.",
    "Retest player statistics after modifications to verify accuracy."
  ],
  "qa_notes": [
    "Ensure detailed data encryption implementation is provided.",
    "Include performance optimization strategies in future developer outputs."
  ]
}
